_comment: Example selector file for TransactionSelectors. Keys starting with '_' are documentation only and ignored by the app. Adjust regexes and field names to match your CSV header translations.

_notes.Field: The field name to test (e.g., Category, Memo, Description or any OtherFields key).
_notes.Filter: A regular expression applied to the field value. Use (?i) for case-insensitive matching where supported.
_notes.TargetGroup: Name of the group to assign when the selector matches.
_notes.AmountOperation: Optional. One of: "Equal", "Less", "Greater", or "None" (None means ignore amount).
_notes.Amount: Optional decimal value used with AmountOperation when present.
